intro: Lepidium aletes, also known as Desert Cress, is an annual plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae), characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and edible leaves. The health benefits of Desert Cress include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Lepidium aletes include isothiocyanates, glucosinolates, and flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-cancer and antimicrobial activities.
